title: Peepo Totem
description: Transform your Totem of Undying into a cute little peepo frog!
body:
This resourcepack changes your Totem of Undying to be a cute little peepo. This is it.

![Peepo Blush Totem on the floor.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2cea8c79edcc6fdaf1e5879b53b6bb493fe13548_0.webp)

Note that on newer versions Minecraft might tell you that the resource pack is outdated, but the resourcepack should still work!
